2008.issue: [S2008] Version 0.0.23 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3025.issue: [E3025] "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" matrix is missing required node.js version 20. Tests with node.js 20 are required.

3032.issue: [W3032] Release 0.0.23 from [io-package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.renault/blob/master/io-package.json)/package.json has not yet been tagged. Tagging releases is required.

4047.issue: [S4047] Adapter "renault" is not yet available in the stable repository. Please consider adding it.

5004.issue: [S5004] Plain setInterval() found in source files (main.js). Please use this.setInterval() or adapter.setInterval() instead.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (main.js). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5060.issue: [W5060] Package "json-bigint" is listed in dependencies of [package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.renault/blob/master/package.json) but not imported or required by any scanned source file. Dependency might be unused.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/chargeHistoryLimit" attribute "label" uses key "Charge history entries to keep" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

6023.issue: [W6023] Sentry plugin is configured in [io-package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.renault/blob/master/io-package.json) but the required Sentry information was not found in [README.md](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.renault/blob/master/README.md). Please add the standard Sentry notice near the top of [README.md](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.renault/blob/master/README.md).

8005.issue: [S8005] No GitHub release found. Please use GitHub releases for easier identification of the current release and consider using "@iobroker/action-deploy".

0071.issue: [S0071] No devDependency for "@iobroker/eslint-config" found. Consider migrating to the shared ESLint config.

0073.issue: [S0073] "eslint":"^10.4.0" is >= 9.0.0 but "@iobroker/eslint-config" is not used. Consider migrating to "@iobroker/eslint-config".

0088.issue: [S0088] "/tsconfig.json" should contain an extends clause like "extends": "@tsconfig/node20/tsconfig.json" (see ioBroker.examples).

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. The current engines.node clause ">=20" allows Node.js 20.0.0 as minimum. Please update it to require at least ">=22" at [package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.renault/blob/master/package.json).

0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.3.2 specified. 3.4.1 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.renault/blob/master/package.json)

0063.issue: [W0063] "@types/mocha" are included in "@iobroker/testing". Remove from devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.renault/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.1" at [package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.renault/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
